## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I followed `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated documentation for user-facing changes.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` for user-visible changes.
- [ ] I ran `python -m ruff format --check src tests`.
- [ ] I ran `python -m pytest`.
- [ ] I ran `python -m build`.
